title: Fishes! Undead, Rise Ye
description: A mod that adds a variety of undead fish to the world.
body:
![Fishes! Undead, Rise Ye](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/923721813073207306/1162504389349609483/image.png)

**Fishes! Undead, Rise Ye** is a mod that adds a variety of undead fish big and small to the world.

Currently, the mod adds four undead fish to the game:  
 - Fishbones, small skeletal fish with 6 variations that swim around passively and escape from players.   
 - Bone Trout, a slightly larger skeletal fish that will occasionally attack the player, but are not terribly threatening.  
 - Fossor's Lure, a huge skeletal angler that will eat any fishbones (or player) that get too close.  
 - Guulfish, a large zombie-like fish that will attack with its third eye before charging the player down.   

Currently, all mobs spawn in Deep Oceans. This can be disabled in the mod's config, and is subject to change in the future.

Made for the 1.12 Coalition SpookyJam.
1.12 Modding Coalition [Discord](https://discord.gg/H48ums4RDa)
